title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description: UPS, a global leader in logistics and package delivery, is seeking an Accounts Payable Specialist for our Indianapolis operations center. You'll manage vendor payments and financial transactions in a fast-paced environment. Join our team on-site and help keep the world's largest package delivery company running smoothly.
responsibilities: Process accounts payable invoices and payments for vendors and suppliers
Verify invoice accuracy and reconcile vendor statements
Enter payment transactions in our accounting system and maintain detailed records
Resolve discrepancies and coordinate with vendors regarding payment issues
Assist with month-end close activities and reconciliations
Support audit activities and maintain compliance with financial procedures

requirements.education: High School diploma or GED; Associate's degree in Accounting or Finance preferred
skills: Accounts payable processing and invoice reconciliation
Proficiency with accounting software and SAP systems
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

benefits: On-site position in UPS Indianapolis operations center
